name: Menudo (Tripe Stew)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place tripe in a large saucepan and cover with water. Simmer at low heat until tripe is tender.
2. Drain tripe and reserve liquid. Remove and discard fatty portions of tripe and cut into 1-inch pieces. Set aside.
3. Sauté onions in shortening in a medium-sized saucepan over medium heat. Set aside.
4. Beat egg whites until stiff in a small mixing bowl. Add egg yolks and continue to beat until mixture is lemon-colored. Add flour and salt and mix well.
5. Fold cooked tripe into egg mixture. Add tripe mixture to saucepan containing sautured onions. Cook over medium heat until eggs are set.
6. Add reserved liquid from tripe and garlic salt to egg mixture and simmer at low heat for 5-10 minutes.
